observation: I can see the Specter.AI sign-up form with email and password fields visible. The email field has been filled with 'ai.test.user@example.com' but the password input failed in the previous step. I can see the password field (element 7) is available and I need to try inputting the password again.

dual_diagnosis.visual_observation: The dashed outline boxes and colored numbered elements (2, 3, 4, 6) that were present in the BEFORE screenshot have completely disappeared in the AFTER screenshot. The page now shows only the header with Specter.AI logo and Sign Up button, with the rest being a blank gray area.
dual_diagnosis.diagnosis: Input action on password field caused the form elements to disappear entirely instead of progressing the sign-up flow. This suggests either a JavaScript error, improper form handling, or the action triggered an unexpected page state.
